column14: Tobin wade 20 m US of control structure.  Upper intake not submerged in stream. RS at 13:11. After reset realized well was dry, both intakes out of water inside well, lower intake submerged in creek therefore opening WL invalid. Did not have spare sub in either truck - will return tomorrow to install sub in stream.  Mid-section
